titleStmt.title: SII 24.433: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 433. (A.R. No. 152 of 1938-39.) CHAKKARATTĀḺVĀR SHRINE, SOUTH WALL.

summary.p: Registers a gift of 2 vēli of land to Tiruvāḻi-Āḻvāṉ (Chakrattāḻvār) by Rāmachandran alias Śrīraṅganārāyaṇa Jīyar Brahmārāyaṉ, son of Śrī Narasimha-bhaṭṭar, out of the lands granted to him by his preceptor Śrīraṅga- nārāyaṇa-Jīyar on the occasion when the latter bestowed the title of Śrīraṅganārāyaṇa Jīyar-Brahmārāyaṉ on him (Rāmchandran). Records also another gift of land to Hanumān consecrated by the donor. The details of the date viz. Śaka 1460, Viḷambi, Karkaṭaka, ba. 5, Sunday, Pūraṭṭādi are irregular as the tithi ba. 5 in Karkaṭaka of the year corresponding to 1538 A.D., July 16 was a Tuesday and the nakshatra on that day was Uttarābhādra (Uttiraṭṭādi), ·78.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīman mahārājādhirājan rājaparameśvaran śrīvirapratāpa Accuta tevamakaārāyar pṛdhivirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakābtam 1000 4 100 6 10 Itaṉ mel
cellāniṉṟa viḷambisamvatsarattu rkkaṭakanāyaṟṟu kṛṣṇapakṣattu pañcamiyum Ātittavāramum peṟṟa pūraṭṭāti nakṣatrattu nāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭikulācaṉivaḷa
ṉāṭṭu viḻāvaṟāviti vaḷanāṭṭu tiruvaraṅkaṉ tiruppati tiruvāḻi Āḻvāṉukku It tiruppati kauśika gotrattu Āpastampasūtrattu śrīnarasimhapaṭṭar putran kaiyiṅkariyam
Irāmacandran pratinnāmam Āṉa śrīraṅganārāyaṇacciyar brahmārāyaṉeṉ poliyūṭṭu cilāśāsanam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi . muṉṉāḷ Inakku śrīraṅganārāyaṇacciyar
tirunāmam piṟasātikkiṟa potu makarasaṅkiṟānti puṇṇiya kālattile hiraṇya Utakadhārāpūrvam Āka teṉkarai Irācakempira vaḷanāṭṭu Uṟaiyūr kūṟṟattu
kūṭalūril Irācavipāṭaṉiṉāl rūpāy nañce kku 10 5- lil pūrvam ciyar kovilukku cetta rūpāy 6li nikki rūpāy 9li Itil Eṉakku śrīraṅkanārāyaṇacciyar makarasa ya kāla
ttile sahiraṇya Udakadhārāpūṟuvamāka Añcilk kūṭalūril tammuṭaiya mānnyattil nañcai nilattil Añciloṉṟukku Irācavipāṭaniṉāl rūpāy m 2 li Innilam Iruveli
Inta makarasaṅkiṟānti puṇyakālattile Udakadhārāpūrvamāka kuṭuttu nāṉ nāḷatu varaiyum Aṉupavittu vanta Irācavipāṭaniṉāl nila � 2 li Inta nilam Iru veli muṉṉāḷ
Irāccampā Amutu ceytaruḷa nāṉ viṭṭa poliyūṭṭu taḷikai Oṉṟu niṅkalāka nāḷtoṟum mattiyāṉattile Amutu ceytaruḷa kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭapaṭikku cal
taḷikai 1 Inta taḷikai Oṉṟukkum Iṟṟai nāḷ Inta Iruveli nilamum cettapaṭiyāle Inta nilam Iruveliyum śrīpaṇṭārattile k koṇṭu
Inta nilam Iru veliyil Utayatte(k)koṇṭu tiruvāḻi Āḻvāṉukku Amutu ceytaruḷa kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭa taḷikai Oṉṟukku ṉāḷ Oṉṟukku
tiruvaraṅkatevaṉāl Amutupaṭi Aṟunāḻi paruppu Amutu Iru nāḻi neyamutu Iru nāḻi Uri kaṟi Amutu teṅkāyamutu paḻa Amutu vellam ca ḷa
campāram Erikarumpu Uḷppaṭṭa vakaikku Inta nilattil Utaiyaṅkoṇṭu nāḷ toṟum Ācantirārkkastāyiyāka ṉāḷtoṟum Amutu ceytaruḷak
kaṭavarākavum . Itukku viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu cetti nālattoṉṟu Intap poliyūṭṭu kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭa prāsādam Irāmacantiṟarkku santāṉa paramparai
āka Ācandrārkkasthāyi Āka peṟakkaṭavatākavum . Ituvum cintāmaṇi paṭukaiyil nāṉ muladhanamRepresented by a symbol mūpeṟṟu ṉṉa cālai vaḻikku meṟku pañ�
Itil Eviḷampi varuṣam kāttikai māsattile Aṉumāṉaiyum paṭukaiyile toppu vaittu An yil śrīhanumāṉaiyum pratiṣṭai
koyilum kaṭṭi haṉumāṉukku tiruppaṇi tiruvārātaṉattukku Iṟṟai nāḷ cetta kuḻi kaiyyil tiruppaṭuttaram vaiytta 5
kuḻi muṉṉūṟu Inta vakaippaṭi paṭuttaram Iraṅkanāthadevaṟku sāyaṅkālattil ṭait tirumālai kaiṅkariyamā
kaṭavatākavum . Inta kayiṅkariyam Irāmacandraṟukku paramparaiyāka
kaṇakku śrīraṅganārāyaṇapriyan Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 24.433 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
